home.title: Welcome to AgentDock Web Template
home.description: A Next.js scaffold with four-layer architecture.

hero.title: Build SaaS Faster with AgentDock
hero.subtitle: A production-ready Next.js scaffold with four-layer architecture, Supabase auth, i18n, and AI coding agent integration. Ship your next product in days, not months.

features.title: Everything you need to ship
features.subtitle: Built-in features that let you focus on your product, not the boilerplate.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Complete auth flow with email/password, OAuth, and password reset. Secured by Supabase.

monorepo.title: Monorepo Ready
monorepo.description: Turborepo + pnpm workspace with shared packages for types, ESLint, and tooling.

aiCoding.title: AI Coding Ready
aiCoding.description: Structured for AI agents with clear contracts, design system, and copilot instructions.

docs.title: Docs Co-evolution
docs.description: Fumadocs-powered documentation that grows alongside your application.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get up and running in three simple steps.

step1.title: Scaffold
step1.description: Run the CLI to generate your project with all batteries included.

step2.title: Customize
step2.description: Adjust tokens, colors, and content to match your brand.

step3.title: Ship
step3.description: Deploy to Vercel with one command and start building.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Pricing plans coming soon. Contact us for early access.

auth.signupSubtitle: Enter your details to get started
auth.emailHelperText: Use a real email address — you'll need to verify it after sign up.
auth.verifyEmailMessage: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to complete your sign up.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.termsText: By clicking continue, you agree to our
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: A reset link has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
auth.resetLinkExpired: The reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences.
profile.displayNameCardDescription: Update your display name shown across the app.
profile.contactSupportToChange: To change your email, please contact support.
